title: Device Settings - Check if setting's value persist after closing tab, settings page or app
scenario: Verify that all HS settings values persist after closing/reopening tabs, navigating away and back, and killing/restarting the app.
steps: Open app with attached HS and navigate to HS settings page.
Change values in all settings (should be changeable).
Close and reopen each tab that has settings with values — values should remain as set.
Go back to Home page and return to settings page — values should persist.
Kill and restart the app, then open settings page — values should still be as set.
expected: Setting values persist after closing the tab, settings page, or the app.
